steps.screen:
[23CIt is written in the Book of Mars:

[27CAfter the Creation, the cruel god Moloch rebelled
[27Cagainst the authority of Marduk the Creator.
[17Clqqqq[5CMoloch stole from Marduk the most powerful of all
[17Cx~~[97md[39m~[5Cthe artifacts of the gods, the Amulet of Yendor,
[17Cx~~~[97m@[39m[5Cand he hid it in the dark cavities of Gehennom, the
[17C[33m+[39m~~~~[5CUnder World, where he now lurks, and bides his time.
[17Cx~~~~
[17Cx~~~~ Your god Mars seeks to possess the Amulet, and with it
[17Cm~qqq to gain deserved ascendance over the other gods.

[23CYou, a newly trained Tenderfoot, have been heralded
[23Cfrom birth as the instrument of Mars.  You are destined
[23Cto recover the Amulet for your deity, or die in the
[23Cattempt.  Your hour of destiny has come.  For the sake
[23Cof us all:  Go bravely with Mars!
[23C--More--
